challenge.title: Korak 5
challenge.description: Sada nakon što ste prebacili sav vaš alfabet, uklonite poziv za print(shifted_alphabet).

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
shift = 5
shifted_alphabet = alphabet[shift:] + alphabet[:shift]
print(shifted_alphabet)

challengeFiles.name: main
